sub_mechanisms: M_1: estimate local curvature of hidden-state trajectory via second derivative of cosine distance
M_2: map estimated curvature to a scalar gating temperature
M_3: modulate per-layer attention softmax temperature
M_4: per-token adaptation based on trajectory bending
stripped_llm_application: A context-gating signal that estimates intrinsic curvature of the reasoning trace through hidden-state space and modulates attention selectivity proportional to local curvature.
stripping_rule_applied: removed: Riemann, Ricci, sectional, scalar, geodesic, Gauss-Bonnet
